paper: Corporate and Other Laws  |  Master Test 01

steps.for: scheme 2 - definition of fellow subsidiary as related party
scheme 1 - s.16 provision, RD direction power
scheme 2 - expert consent withdrawn before delivery
scheme 4 - reasonable belief statement true, partial
scheme b - Board recommended and OR passed
scheme d - no employee statutory dues default
scheme e - bonus on fully paid shares
scheme c - no deposit/debt interest default
scheme 3 - application: Romit exceeds annual salary

crosses.for: her conclusion that Alok has remedies

remarks.title: Part I
lines: 9 of 15. Q2, Q5, and Q6 wrong or not attempted. Q5 was left blank.
Q2 and Q6 options are incorrect: keys are B and D respectively, you wrote C for both.
All other five MCQs are correct and earned full marks.

remarks.title: Related party / wholly owned subsidiaries
lines: Earned: 1 mark for defining fellow subsidiaries as related parties under s.2(76)(viii)(B).
Not earned: 4 marks. You failed to mention the Notification G.S.R. 464(E) dated 5 June 2015
which exempts private companies from s.188's related-party transactions constraint.
Thus, your conclusion that they are treated as a related party for s.188 is incomplete.

remarks.title: Company name / Trade Marks Act
lines: Earned: 4.5 marks. Excellent presentation of the RD's direction powers, time limits,
and the 3-year window. Ground (ii) is correctly evaluated.
Half earned: Ground (i) analysis. You stated the name is nearly resembling & identical,
but didn't explicitly note that it was verbatim identical to Mr. X's trademark.
Warning: Section 16 is never named. Remember to cite the relevant section number.

remarks.title: Expert liability for misstatement in prospectus
lines: Earned: 1 mark. You correctly identified the consent withdrawal exception (0.5 marks)
and the expert's belief that the statement was true (0.5 marks).
Not earned: 4 marks. Your conclusion that Alok has remedies is incorrect. Under s.35(1),
remedies are only available if the subscriber has sustained loss or damage. No loss or
damage was pleaded or sustained on the facts, so he has no remedy. You also missed
the public notice exception.

remarks.title: Bonus shares
lines: Earned: 5 / 5 marks. Perfect response. All pre-requisites under Section 63(2) (Articles
authorization, Board recommendation/resolution, no default on employee dues,
fully paid-up shares, and no default on deposit/debt interest) are clearly listed.

remarks.title: Deposits
lines: Earned: 5 / 5 marks. Excellent analysis. Both parts are perfect. You correctly stated
that a banking loan is not a deposit, and that the Government company limit is 35%
of paid-up capital + free reserves + securities premium under Rule 3(5).

remarks.title: Financial assistance to buy own shares
lines: Try to attempt all parts of the question.

remarks.title: Employee security deposit
lines: Earned: 5 / 5 marks. Complete and accurate. You correctly named Rule 2(1)(c) and
Rule 2(1)(c)(x) for non-interest-bearing employee security deposit, and accurately
applied it to Romit's salary of 5.3L vs 5.0L.

footer: Connect with an SME if you would like to discuss this feedback in detail.
